creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Thank you for your new port submittion for www/sencha-touch. 
We are sorry it took so long to get to this port, and hope you are still interested in contributing to helping make FreeBSD  
the operating system of choice for the works best developers and most loyal users. 
Once committed, any of your updates will come much faster. 

I have a couple of observations and questions. 
1) I noticed that sencha-touch 1.1.1 is released. (you might consider a pr later to update this port) 
Q: have you tried 1.1.1? Is it just a matter of distfiles patch and portversion change or are their pkg-plist changes? 
2) I noticed that you used a paid service for your distribution file (cachefly) 
Many commercial and business sites might block media distribution servers. 
Q: is this your account?  Did you know many accounts need to pay for bandwidth usage ? 
Q: did you know that source is available from sencha's own servers ? 
Q: if this is not your account, and not sencha's account, do you have permission to use that mirror? 

3) NOPORTDOCS/NOPORTEXAMPLES are generally a make.conf or env variables. Trying to modify them with knobs in your port 
Could cause conflicts 
4) no need for .include<pre> in many cases. 

For now, I have included both master_sites in the Makefile, awaiting your answers to these questions. 
I will send you a completed tarball of my changes once you reply.
